label: Protein Structure Prediction
description: Predict protein structures using Boltz-2, OpenFold 3, Chai-1, AlphaFold 2, or ESMFold. Provides a unified interface with automatic parameter mapping, format conversion, output normalization, and confidence scoring.

parameters.label: Prediction Tool
parameters.desc: Structure prediction engine. 'auto' discovers the best available tool based on input format, device, and installed software. Boltz-2, OpenFold 3, and Chai-1 are diffusion-based with highest accuracy. OpenFold 3 is an open-source AF3 reproduction supporting protein/DNA/RNA/ligand complexes. AlphaFold 2 uses co-evolutionary features (requires database). ESMFold is fastest (single-sequence, no MSA, CPU-capable).

parameters.label: Input File
parameters.desc: Protein sequence in FASTA format (.fasta, .fa). Boltz also accepts YAML for full feature support (ligands, constraints, templates).

parameters.label: Number of Samples
parameters.desc: Number of structure samples to generate. Applies to Boltz and Chai only. More samples give diversity at the cost of runtime.

parameters.label: Recycling Iterations
parameters.desc: Number of recycling iterations for structure refinement. Maps to tool-specific recycling parameters.

parameters.label: Random Seed
parameters.desc: Random seed for reproducibility.

parameters.label: Output Format
parameters.desc: Primary structure output format. Both PDB and mmCIF are always generated; this controls which is primary.

parameters.label: MSA Mode
parameters.desc: Multiple Sequence Alignment strategy. 'none' for single-sequence (ESMFold default). 'server' to generate MSA via ColabFold MMseqs2 (Boltz, Chai). 'upload' to provide a pre-computed MSA file.

parameters.label: MSA File
parameters.desc: Pre-computed MSA file (.a3m, .sto). Required when msa_mode is 'upload'. Auto-converted to tool-native format (Parquet for Chai, injected into YAML for Boltz).

parameters.label: Diffusion Sampling Steps
parameters.desc: Number of diffusion sampling steps. Applies to Boltz and Chai only. Higher values may improve quality at increased runtime. Default: 200.

parameters.label: MSA Server URL
parameters.desc: Custom ColabFold MMseqs2 server URL. Overrides the default public server. Implies msa_mode='server'. Boltz and Chai only.

parameters.label: Use Inference Potentials
parameters.desc: Apply inference-time potentials to improve physical plausibility of predicted structures. Boltz only. Default: false.

parameters.label: AlphaFold Database Directory
parameters.desc: Path to AlphaFold2 genetic databases (~2TB). Required when tool is 'alphafold'. Contains uniref90, mgnify, pdb70/pdb_seqres, BFD/small_bfd.

parameters.label: AlphaFold Model Preset
parameters.desc: AlphaFold2 model configuration. 'monomer' for single chains, 'multimer' for complexes. AlphaFold only.

parameters.label: AlphaFold Database Preset
parameters.desc: Database configuration. 'reduced_dbs' uses small_bfd (~17GB), 'full_dbs' uses BFD+uniref30 (~1.8TB). AlphaFold only.

parameters.label: AlphaFold Max Template Date
parameters.desc: Maximum PDB template release date (YYYY-MM-DD). Templates after this date are excluded to prevent data leakage. AlphaFold only.

parameters.label: Half-Precision Inference
parameters.desc: Use FP16 (half-precision) inference to reduce memory usage and increase speed. ESMFold only.

parameters.label: Chunk Size
parameters.desc: Chunk size for processing long sequences. Smaller values use less GPU memory. ESMFold only.

parameters.label: Max Tokens per Batch
parameters.desc: Maximum number of tokens (amino acids) per batch for multi-sequence input. ESMFold only.

parameters.label: Diffusion Samples
parameters.desc: Number of diffusion samples per query. OpenFold 3 only. Default: 5.

parameters.label: Model Seeds
parameters.desc: Number of independent model seeds. OpenFold 3 only. Default: 1.

parameters.label: Use Templates
parameters.desc: Use PDB template structures for improved accuracy. OpenFold 3 only. Default: true.

parameters.label: Output Folder
parameters.desc: Workspace folder for prediction results. Output includes model structures (PDB/mmCIF), confidence.json, and metadata.json.

parameters.label: Output File
parameters.desc: Optional workspace output file path.
